blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 18" over the past week. Current depth: 9".
